titleStmt.title: SII 15.70: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 70. (B.K. No. 48 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a beam in the Nannēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1108, Parābhava, Pushya śu. 13, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti, corresponding to 1186 A.D., December 25, Thursday, f.d.t. °07.
It records a gift of five paṇas out of the income from minting operations, made by the Āṇikāṟa Śaṅkara Śeṭṭi, son of Baṇḍiya Basaviseṭṭi, for worship in the temple of Nannēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvara dēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire sakava¨rṣada 1108 neya parābava saṁvatsarada pusya suddha 13 bṛhavāra yuttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti�
śrīmaṁnannēśvaradēvara Aṁgabhōgakācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantāgi śrīmadakkasāladaccina kammaṭadalu naḍeva yāṇikāṟaṁ baṁḍiya basaviseṭṭiyara magaṁ śrīśaṁkaraseṭṭi yaru biṭṭapaṇa
Aydu yintī dhammamaṁ variṣaṁ prati naḍeva yāṇikāṟaru teṁtamma dha¨rmmavāgi pratipāḷisu varu ©
Digital edition of SII 15.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
